degraded.detail: Real-browser web E2E of the Mission tab + Linux-only visual-baseline regen (3 mission baselines) deferred to CI; the rendering logic is covered by real-DOM component tests (MissionLeftPanel, TestsDetail) and the wire-sync guard, and the merged-ref/tests/merge path was proven end-to-end against the real main tree.

behaviors.behavior: Ref blob is TTL-cached; a live run never consults the ref; a local row short-circuits it
behaviors.evidence: merged-events.test.ts (TTL count, isWorktree gate, local-row) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: A merged-ref miss is uncacheable so a later fetch is picked up
Tests artifact leads with recorded counts even when commit is empty and no diff
Tests still hides/unavailable honestly when nothing was recorded
TestsDetail leads with the result headline and shows no empty table
behaviors.evidence: MissionSlice2Details.test.tsx counts-led cases + missionArtifacts.test.ts testsResultText PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Green Merge step lights from the real merge state for a standalone iterate
Neutral phase pills stay legible in .mc-top (no --color-text)
End-to-end merged-ref + tests + merge on the real main tree for first-contact-hero
behaviors.evidence: throwaway integration probe: found, PR#321, merged, 'All 3037 tests passing', 'Delivered - merged' (2026-07-23)
covered by the deferred visual-baseline regen (3 mission baselines)

surface_verification.justification: Rendering + API-shape behaviour is covered by real-DOM component tests (MissionLeftPanel renders the stepper and asserts merged->green; TestsDetail renders the counts-led body) and the server<->client wire-sync guard; the merged-ref/tests/merge data path was proven end-to-end against the real main tree. The full isolated-stack web E2E + Linux-only visual-baseline regen are recorded as degraded and run in CI.
surface_verification.note: Backend-affects-frontend: the mission-context response gained a `results` field, mirrored and sync-guarded. Real-browser + baseline regen deferred to CI (see degraded).
